detail.description:
Get ready for the FIFA World Cup 2026™ with the official FIFA Panini Collection by Coca‑Cola — the ultimate digital sticker album for football fans!

Collect, swap, and complete all 48 national teams in the most exciting Panini experience ever made.
Feel the nostalgia of opening sticker packs, the thrill of discovering new players, and the fun of completing your album — all from your smartphone.

Start collecting today and complete your album before September 30, 2026!

Enjoy the full FIFA Panin
